definition.en: The inner ego is the organizer of experience that Jung would call unconscious. The inner ego is another term for what we call the inner self.
definition.zh: 内在自我是荣格称之为无意识的经验组织者。内在自我是我们所称的内在自我的另一个术语。

definition.en: At your stage of development the inner ego is by far the most self-conscious part of the whole self, and has the greatest ability for perception and organization. It alone is capable of experiencing inner and basic reality directly and immediately.
definition.zh: 在你们的发展阶段，内在自我是整体自我中迄今为止最有自我意识的部分，并拥有最强大的感知和组织能力。只有它能够直接且即时地体验内在和基本实相。

definition.en: The inner ego is indeed the 'I' of your dreams, having somewhat the same sort of position within the inner self as the ego itself has to the physical self.
definition.zh: 内在自我确实是你们梦境中的‘我’，在内在自我中所处的位置，与自我本身相对于物质自我的位置大致相同。

definition.en: The inner ego is the director as you know, but the whole self must know itself simultaneously. It is not enough that the inner ego knows what is going on. Ultimately therefore the inner ego must itself bring about comprehension on the parts of the various portions.
definition.zh: 如你所知，内在自我是导演，但整体自我必须同时认识自身。内在自我知道正在发生什么是不够的。因此，最终内在自我必须自身促成各个部分的理解。

definition.en: The inner ego is aware of fewer barriers and therefore is not bound by time to the degree that the outer ego is bound.
definition.zh: 内在自我意识到较少的障碍，因此不像外在自我那样受时间束缚。

explanation: 内在自我意识是整体自我的核心组织者，它负责维持整个自我的根基与平衡。与外在自我意识不同，内在自我意识通过内在感官接收信息，能够直接体验内在与基本实相。它不受物质时间和因果限制的束缚，因此能感知外在自我无法触及的未来选择与多重实相。内在自我意识是外在自我意识的源头和蓝本，外在自我意识只是它的仿像。内在自我意识不仅知晓自身，也清楚外在自我意识的存在，并在整体自我受到威胁时介入。它持续运作，同时始终处于“成为”的状态，包含当前人格的全部潜能蓝图。在梦境和投射状态中，内在自我意识尤为活跃，它是人格中拥有最高觉知与创造力的部分，也是实体在特定转世中的代表。

quotes.text: The inner ego knows when to apply safety valves, and is aware of the danger before the outer ego is alerted. The inner ego is concerned with maintaining the foundations and balance, which is very important, of the whole self, and it is open to messages from the overall entity. The inner ego receives messages through the inner senses, and is aware of realities which the outer ego cannot afford to recognize because of its specialization. In some important aspects the outer ego is supposed to represent to some degree the subdominant personalities who still dwell in the subconscious. When the outer ego is narrow, and poorly represents these subdominant personalities then they rise up in arms, and when conditions are favorable attempt to express themselves through a momentary weakness on the part of the dominant ego. But without even doing this they may momentarily take over or express themselves through a single function, such as speech or motion, while the outer ego is blissfully unaware.
quotes.translation: 内我知晓何时启动安全阀，在外我被警示之前就已察觉危险。内我负责维护整个自体的根基与平衡——这至关重要——并随时接收来自整体存有的讯息。内我通过内在感官接收讯息，能感知外我因其专门化而无法承认的实相。在某些重要层面，外我本应适度代表仍栖居于潜意识中的次人格。当外我变得狭隘且未能妥善代表这些次人格时，它们便会揭竿而起，一旦条件成熟，就会趁主导自我出现短暂薄弱之际试图表达自己。即便不采取如此激烈的行动，它们也可能在主导自我浑然不觉时，通过单一功能（如言语或动作）暂时接管或表达自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now the inner ego is the organizer of experience that Jung would call unconscious. The inner ego is another term for what we call the inner self. As the outer ego manipulates within the environment and physical reality, so the inner ego or self organizes and manipulates within an inner reality. The inner ego creates that physical reality with which the outer ego then deals.
quotes.translation: 内我则是荣格所称"无意识"的经验组织者。内我即我们所谓内在自体的另一称谓。正如外我在环境与物质实相中运作，内我或内在自体也在内在实相中组织与运作。内我创造着外我随后应对的那个物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Tuesday does not exist to the inner ego. Your outer ego is now experiencing the camouflage time year of 1964. This simply does not exist to the inner ego, therefore the inner ego is effortlessly aware of any choices or decisions that you may make freely in say 1970. It does not affect your choice. It has absolutely nothing to do with whatever future choice you may make. It is aware of such future choices simply because the camouflage future does not exist for it.
quotes.translation: 星期二对内我而言并不存在。你的外我此刻正经历着1964年的伪装时间年。这对内我而言根本不存在，因此内我能毫不费力地觉察你在1970年可能自由做出的任何选择或决定。这不会影响你的选择，与你未来可能做出的任何选择也毫无关联。它之所以能觉察这些未来选择，仅仅因为伪装性的未来对它而言并不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This inner ego knows the outer ego well. The outer ego is but a counterfeit image of the inner ego. The outer ego as a rule is not aware of what you may think of for now as the thoughts or communications of the inner ego; but the inner ego knows every step you take, every particle of air you breathe, every dream you have; and it is the source of your own personality and is the representative of the entity of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 这个内在自我对外在自我了如指掌。外在自我不过是内在自我的仿冒形象。外在自我通常意识不到你此刻可能视为内在自我的思想或沟通；但内在自我知晓你踏出的每一步、你呼吸的每一粒空气、你做的每一个梦；它是你人格的源头，也是它所隶属的存有的代表。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is communication between them but they are not aware of it. The tape is the element common to all the channels. Now. The inner ego is the director as you know, but the whole self must know itself simultaneously. It is not enough that the inner ego knows what is going on. Ultimately therefore the inner ego must itself bring about comprehension on the parts of the various portions.
quotes.translation: 它们之间存在沟通，但彼此并未察觉。磁带是所有通道共有的元素。现在。内在自我如你所知是导演，但整体自我必须同时知晓自身。仅仅内在自我知道发生什么是不够的。因此最终内在自我必须让各个部分达成理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Through experience in the various levels of existence the inner ego and the outer ego come closer and closer together. The subconscious eventually disappears, as it is no longer needed as a necessary buffer zone. At your stage of development the inner ego is by far the most self-conscious part of the whole self, and has the greatest ability for perception and organization. It alone is capable of experiencing inner and basic reality directly and immediately. It alone can cope with the tumultuous nature of such direct reality experience.
quotes.translation: 通过在不同存在层面的经验，内在自我与外在自我越来越接近。潜意识最终消失，因为它不再需要作为必要的缓冲地带。在你目前的发展阶段，内在自我是整体自我中自我意识最强的部分，拥有最强大的感知与组织能力。唯有它能直接即刻体验内在与基本实相。唯有它能应对这种直接实相体验的狂暴本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These sub personalities are not unconscious to themselves. They are conscious of themselves, but they are not conscious of themselves in relation to other selves. They are conscious of needs and drives, and of their existence. They are different from the inner ego or director in that the inner ego is conscious not only of itself, but of the outer ego, and is aware of the existence of the outer world, although not too much concerned with it unless the whole self becomes jeopardized through the actions of the outer ego.
quotes.translation: 这些次人格对自身并非无意识。它们意识到自身的存在，但并未意识到自身与其他自我之间的关系。它们意识到自身的需求、驱动力及存在。它们与内在自我或导演不同，因为内在自我不仅意识到自身，也意识到外在自我，并知晓外在世界的存在——尽管除非整体自我因外在自我的行为而陷入危机，否则它并不太关注外在世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is indeed the "I" of your dreams, having somewhat the same sort of position within the inner self as the ego itself has to the physical self. Actions however merge within the inner ego. The scope of awareness is more complex. We will at a later time discuss this inner ego in connection with the dream situation and health.
quotes.translation: 内在自我确实是你梦境中的"我"，它在内在自我中所处的位置，类似于自我在物质自我中的位置。然而，行动在内在自我中融合。觉知的范围更为复杂。日后我们将结合梦境情境与健康来讨论这个内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When in such dreams your perceptions seem exceedingly clear, you can be certain that the inner ego is operating. Now all portions of the personality, of the present personality, belong to this inner ego. It functions constantly, and yet it is always in a state of becoming. It is more than what you are at any given moment in your time. It contains, and j^, the psychological blueprint containing the full potential of the present personality within any given incarnation.
quotes.translation: 当你在这类梦境中感知变得异常清晰时，可以确定是内在自我在运作。现在，人格的所有部分——当前人格的所有部分——都属于这个内在自我。它持续运作，却始终处于"成为"的状态。它超越你在时间中任何特定时刻的存在。它包含并是那心理蓝图，其中蕴含着任何特定转世中当前人格的全部潜能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Many limitations are set upon personalities by their own entities for karmic reasons. I want to make it plain that free will does exist, but that it is limited through use of a more extended free will on the part of the entity. Also, the inner ego is aware of so-called future decisions not because he forces such decisions upon the outer ego but simply because the future as such does not exist to the inner ego, and therefore he can perceive where the outer ego cannot.
quotes.translation: 许多限制是由人格自身的本体基于业力原因施加的。我要明确说明，自由意志确实存在，但它是通过本体运用更广泛的自由意志而受到限制的。此外，内在自我之所以知晓所谓的未来决定，并非因为它将此类决定强加于外在自我，而仅仅是因为未来本身对内在自我而言并不存在，因此它能洞见外在自我无法企及之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your clock time as you know is camouflage, and does not exist as far as the inner ego is concerned. This certainly should not be strange to you, since you know that even your present personalities can to some extent escape from clock time through the use of psychological time. I have said that there is no time without barriers. The inner ego is aware of fewer barriers and therefore is not bound by time to the degree that the outer ego is bound.
quotes.translation: 你们所知的钟表时间是幻相，就内在自我而言并不存在。这当然不应令你感到奇怪，因为你们知道即便是当前的人格，也能通过运用心理时间在某种程度上摆脱钟表时间。我曾说过，没有障碍就没有时间。内在自我觉察到的障碍较少，因此不像外在自我那样受时间束缚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. This inner ego can also operate within the dream state, and in certain awake-seeming dreams it is the portion that realizes that the personality is not in its normal waking condition. It is this portion of the self that is with you in the most excellent projections. The inner ego is the part of the personality that contains the highest aspirations and capabilities. It has been called by psychologists the subliminal self.
quotes.translation: 现在。这个内在自我也能在梦境状态中运作，在某些看似清醒的梦境中，正是这部分意识到人格并非处于正常的清醒状态。正是自我的这一部分，在最优越的投射中与你同在。内在自我是人格中蕴含最高志向与能力的部分。心理学家曾称之为阈下自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is fully conscious. It is a portion of you, however, that deals with the formation of events, that glories in a rather rambunctious and creative activity that your specifications of time and place physically preclude. The unconscious, so-called, is -- and I have said this before2 -- quite conscious, but in another realm of activity. There must be a psychological chamber between these two portions of the self, however -- these seemingly undifferentiated areas, in which back-and-forth translations can occur. Dream periods provide that service, of course, so that in dreams the two egos can meet and merge to some extent, comparing notes like strangers who perhaps meet on a train at night, and are amazed to discover, after some conversation, that they are indeed close relatives, each embarked upon the same journey though seemingly they travelled alone.
quotes.translation: 内在自我是完全有意识的。它是你的一部分，处理事件的成形，在一种相当狂放而创造性的活动中欢欣鼓舞——这种活动被你特定的时间与空间限制所排除。所谓的无意识——我之前说过——其实是相当有意识的，只是处于另一种活动领域。然而，在这两个自我部分之间——这些看似未分化的区域——必须有一个心理隔间，让来回的翻译得以进行。梦境时段当然提供了这种服务，因此在梦中，两个自我能够相遇并在某种程度上融合，像在夜车上偶遇的陌生人一样交换心得，惊讶地发现经过一番交谈后，他们竟是近亲，各自踏上相同的旅程，尽管看似独自前行。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In many respects it is a reflector, the surface of the self looking outward. While this is necessary, the whole remainder of the self could not be left to an organizer or caretaker who did not focus his attentions within the depths but sat, as it were, on the front porch of the house, leaving the inner workings unattended. The outer ego does not want to meet the inner ego. The outer ego does not want to admit the existence of the inner ego. As the eye cannot see its own pupil without a mirror, so the outer ego could not even see itself, were it not that the inner ego hides in the depths of all reflections.
quotes.translation: 在许多方面，它是一个反射器，是向外看的自我表面。虽然这是必要的，但自我的其余部分不能交给一个不将注意力专注于内在深处、却像坐在房子前廊上、任由内在运作无人照管的管理者或看护者。外在自我不想遇见内在自我。外在自我不想承认内在自我的存在。正如眼睛没有镜子就看不见自己的瞳孔，外在自我甚至无法看见自己，若非内在自我隐藏在一切反射的深处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I said that the inner ego reasons, but its reasoning is not restricted to the cause-and-effect limitations that you apply to the reasoning process. The action of the inner ego within the wider sphere of Framework 2 explains many events and seeming coincidences that otherwise seem to make no sense within your world. Many realities within Framework 2 cannot suitably be explained as facts to you in Framework 1, simply because they involve psychological thicknesses that cannot be translated into facts as you think of them. These often appear in the symbolic language of the arts instead, and many of your dreams are translations in which the events of Framework 2 appear in symbolic form.
quotes.translation: 我说过内在自我会推理，但它的推理不受你加诸推理过程的因果限制。内在自我在框架二的更广领域中的行动，解释了许多在你世界里看似毫无意义的事件和表面巧合。框架二中的许多现实无法适当地作为事实向你解释，仅仅因为它们涉及无法转化为你所认为的事实的心理厚度。这些往往以艺术的象征语言出现，而你的许多梦境就是翻译，其中框架二的事件以象征形式呈现。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As far as self and not-self are concerned, the unit of self is organized, as you know, by the inner ego, which directs the whole energy field. The outer ego directs the manipulation of this gestalt in the physical universe. The outer ego is rather more tied to physical properties, and yet it can directly experience inner reality by a change of focus through aligning itself with the inner ego, focusing its energies with the inner rather than the outer senses. This is by far the most advantageous method of experiencing inner reality, because the outer ego is therefore consciously aware of what has been going on, and can use such knowledge in its own sphere.
quotes.translation: 就自我与非自我而言，自我单元是由内我组织的，如你所知，内我指挥着整个能量场。外我则指挥这个完形在物质宇宙中的操控。外我较为受限于物质属性，然而它可以通过调整焦点与内我对齐，将能量集中于内在而非外在感官，从而直接体验内在实相。这是体验内在实相最有利的方法，因为外我因此能有意识地觉察所发生的事，并在其自身领域运用这些知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The cells and molecules, forming their psychic gestalt into a particular human physical structure, are separated from what you might call the outer environment, and yet they are also connected to the outer environment more than they are separated from it. It is the inner ego, and the inner vitality and the inner ego's determination, along with the cooperation of all the cells that compose the physical body, that enables such a particular structure as the human body to exist as a separate construction, and to maintain the necessary sense of identity.
quotes.translation: 细胞与分子，将其心灵完形塑造成特定的人类物理结构，与你们所谓的外在环境分离，然而它们与外在环境的连接其实多于分离。正是内我、内在活力与内我的决心，加上构成物质身体的所有细胞的合作，才使得人体这样特定的结构能够作为独立的构造存在，并维持必要的身份感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is the self who drives the wheel with purpose; at the same time there are many other wheels and many spokes... Our moment point analogy will also help you here. The sleeping self will of course be considered the primary self from the standpoint of its own reality. I cannot emphasize too strongly the fact that all of these portions are self-conscious. They may not be conscious of the other selves however. The inner senses connect all the selves, and the movements of consciousness are far more complicated than that of a Ferris wheel.
quotes.translation: 内我是有目的地驾驶轮子的自我；同时还有许多其他轮子和辐条……我们的瞬间点类比在此也能帮助你。从自身实相的角度来看，睡眠中的自我当然会被视为主要自我。我无论如何强调都不为过：所有这些部分都具有自我意识。然而它们可能意识不到其他自我。内在感官连接所有自我，而意识的运动远比摩天轮复杂得多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The fact is that the whole self is constantly experiencing data from all of the inner senses. The inner ego is of course aware of this. The subconscious is sometimes aware of this, and the outer ego is aware of very little. I have explained the reasons for this in past sessions. The outer ego must concentrate much of its energy toward survival in and manipulation of the outer camouflage world. This world has already been created by the inner self, and its continuing existence is determined by the constant vigilance of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 事实上，整个自己持续接收所有内在感官传来的资料。内在自我当然知道这一点。潜意识有时也知道，而外在自我知道的很少。我在过去的课程中解释过原因。外在自我必须将大部分精力集中于外在伪装世界的生存与操控上。这个世界已由内在自己创造，其持续存在取决于内在自己不断的警觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When the outer ego, from the surface of its consciousness, reflects the outer world, it sees reflections of the inner ego which are the images within its own eye; and as the self creates matter subconsciously within its own eye, and as the self creates matter subconsciously and not consciously, and as the self creates matter in line with inner and not outer expectations, so then does the ego, in viewing the material universe, come face to face with the face of its own inner ego; and the outer ego cannot escape from this inner self.
quotes.translation: 当外在自我从意识表面反映外在世界时，它看到的是内在自我的映像——这些映像就在它自己的眼中；正如自己潜意识地而非有意识地创造物质，正如自己按照内在而非外在的期望创造物质，那么当自我审视物质宇宙时，它便与自己的内在自我面对面；外在自我无法逃离这个内在自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is a portion of the self, for example -- is the portion of your self -- that is aware of your reincarnational activities. It is the part of you that exists outside of time, yet simultaneously lives in time. You form your own reality. The ego that you are aware of obviously could not form your body for you, however, or grow your bones. It knows how to assess the conditions of the world. It makes deductions. Your reasoning is highly important, yet alone it cannot pump your blood or tell your eyes how to see.
quotes.translation: 内在自我是自身的一部分——例如，它是你自身中知晓你转世活动的那部分。它是你存在于时间之外、同时又活在时间之中的那部分。你形成自己的实相。你所意识到的自我显然无法为你塑造身体或生长骨骼。它知道如何评估世界的状况。它进行推论。你的推理能力非常重要，但仅凭它无法泵动你的血液，也无法告诉你的眼睛如何观看。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Although someone begins reading this material on page one, for example, this does not mean that page four hundred does not already exist. Your outer ego is forced into what could be called successive action, but the inner ego is not so bound. This should make the point more clear. I mentioned earlier that cause and effect operates in various manners, and what seems to be cause and effect is often merely a result of your necessary disposition to view actions in a successive manner.
quotes.translation: 例如，尽管有人从第一页开始阅读这份资料，但这并不意味着第四百页尚未存在。你们的外在自我被迫进入所谓的连续行动，但内在自我并不受此束缚。这一点应该能让问题更清晰。我之前提到过，因果以多种方式运作，而看似因果的现象往往只是你们必须将行动视为连续序列的倾向所导致的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: We must use analogies. It can be thought of as the most exterior projection of the inner ego. When you find yourself, so to speak, watching what you think of as the ego, then you are in contact with this portion of the self. It is aware of both conscious and subconscious motivations and realities, and it is also aware of projections into other fields of actuality. I have hinted before of these matters, for when I say that you will use this other portion of the self to examine waking consciousness and probe beneath it, I already presuppose a you that uses this self. In other words, you are already magnifying the limitations of the self and extending them.
quotes.translation: 我们必须使用类比。这可以被视为内在自我最外在的投射。当你发现自己，可以说，在观察你所认为的自我时，你便与自我的这一部分取得了联系。它既意识到有意识和无意识的动机与实相，也意识到向其他实相领域的投射。我之前曾暗示过这些事，因为当我说你将使用自我的这一其他部分来检视清醒意识并深入其下时，我已经预设了一个使用这一自我的“你”。换句话说，你已经在放大自我的限制并扩展它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: As you have an ego, fully conscious, directed toward the physical world, you also have what I call an inner ego, directed toward inner reality. You have, in other words, a portion of yourself that is fully conscious in Framework 2. The ego in your ordinary world, which again we will call Framework 1, is uniquely equipped to deal with that environment. It manipulates with rules of cause and effect and consecutive moments. It deals with an objectified reality. It can stretch its capacities, becoming far more aware of inner events than it is normally allowed to do, but its main purpose is to deal with the world of effects, to encounter events.
quotes.translation: 正如你们拥有一个完全清醒、面向物质世界的自我，你们也拥有我称之为内在自我的部分，它面向内在实相。换句话说，你们拥有一个在框架二中完全清醒的自我部分。你们普通世界中的自我——我们再次称之为框架一——被独特地装备以处理那个环境。它依据因果规则和连续时刻运作。它处理一个客观化的实相。它可以扩展其能力，比通常允许的程度更深刻地意识到内在事件，但其主要目的是处理效果的世界，去遭遇事件。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I have often said that all these divisions and separations are arbitrary. All exist one within another. Apparent boundaries are not boundaries, but only differences in the focus of attention. Even this inner ego is not the same from one given moment to another, for it is not a static thing, but is a part of continuing action. It is much more familiar with the subconscious and with the dream universe, and with the inner self, than it is with the outside ego, however.
quotes.translation: 我常说过，所有这些划分与分离都是武断的。一切皆相互蕴含其中。看似分明的界限并非真正的界限，只是注意力焦点的差异而已。即便是这个内在自我，也并非从某一刻到下一刻始终如一，因为它并非静止之物，而是持续行动的一部分。然而，它比外在自我更熟悉潜意识、梦境宇宙以及内在自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In other words, Ruburt's ego should be and is properly concerned with contact, development and progress in the physical field. His ego is a critical one. It is his inner ego which is intuitional and gives his critical ego the material from which his books are written; and I expect naturally that his ego, and yours, will critically appraise what we have done here, what we will do, and beyond doubt any suggestions to you that I might make. But also his abilities should be used to better advantage in our sessions, and this I know will only come about when his ego is assured, through examination of our material, of its validity.
quotes.translation: 换言之，鲁柏的自我应当且确实恰当地专注于物质领域的接触、发展与进步。他的自我具有批判性。正是他的内在自我具有直觉性，为其批判性自我提供素材，从而写成他的著作；我自然期待他的自我——以及你的自我——会批判性地评估我们在此已完成之事、将行之事，以及我可能向你提出的任何建议。但同样地，他的能力应在我们的课程中得到更充分的运用，而我知道唯有当他的自我通过审视我们的资料确信其有效性时，这一切方能实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Jung's collective unconscious was an attempt to give your world its psychological roots, but Jung1 could not perceive the clarity, organization, and deeper context in which that collective unconscious has its own existence. Reality as Framework 2 is organized in a different fashion than it is in the Framework 1 world, and the processes of reasoning are far quicker. In Framework 1 the reasoning processes work largely by deduction, and they must constantly check their own results against the seemingly concrete experience of physical events. The reasoning of the inner ego is involved with the creative invention of those experiences. It is involved with events in a context of a different kind, for it deals intimately with probabilities.
quotes.translation: 荣格的集体潜意识试图为你们的世界赋予心理根源，但荣格未能洞见集体潜意识自身存在所依托的清晰性、组织性与更深层脉络。作为框架二的实相，其组织方式与框架一世界截然不同，推理过程也远为迅捷。在框架一中，推理过程主要依赖演绎法，且必须不断以看似具体的物理事件经验来验证自身结果。而内在自我的推理则涉及对这些经验的创造性发明，它在一个不同性质的脉络中与事件打交道，因为它与可能性紧密相连。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I have been wanting to speak further concerning the inner ego, for we have not discussed this issue in any depth. The inner ego is formed about characteristics and abilities that have been dominant in previous personalities, characteristics which the entity has developed through its experience in various lives.
quotes.translation: 我一直想进一步谈谈内在自我，因为我们尚未深入探讨过这个议题。内在自我是由先前人格中占主导地位的特性与能力所形成，这些特性是存有通过在不同生命中的经验发展出来的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is quite true that the inner ego is aware through the inner senses of any choices that the outer ego will make with the use of free will. This does not mean that decisions are in any way predetermined. It only means that the inner ego is not bound by the dimensions in which those free will choices are made.
quotes.translation: 内在自我确实能通过内在感官感知外在自我运用自由意志将做出的任何选择。这并不意味着决定是预先注定的，只表示内在自我不受那些自由意志选择所发生的维度限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The solution may or may not be given to the consciousness. In many instances this would not be necessary. The inner ego of which we have spoken is the director of such unifying activities, and while the inner ego is mainly concerned with inner reality, it is also aware of physical existence.
quotes.translation: 解决方案可能给予意识，也可能不给予。在许多情况下这并非必要。我们所说的内在自我正是这类统合活动的指导者，虽然内在自我主要关注内在实相，但它也知晓物质存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner ego has experienced, then, objectivity, and has returned to a subjective state. It is a relative storehouse of energy, and it is capable of aiding the outer ego when certain conditions arise. The inner ego may be termed the unfamiliar "I". In many cases it is the I who dreams, bringing valuable information to the personal subconscious, information that may be then used for the benefit of the outer ego itself.
quotes.translation: 内我已然体验过客观性，并回归至主观状态。它是一个相对的能量储存库，当特定条件出现时，能够协助外我。内我可被称为陌生的"我"。在许多情况下，正是这个"我"在做梦，将宝贵的信息传递给个人潜意识，这些信息随后可被用于外我自身的利益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The ego, then, is as much characterized by those types of action which it habitually denies, as by those types of actions which it habitually accepts. It is not the only organizing aspect of the personality, however. It is simply the organizing aspect of the personality in its dealings with the physical environment. The inner ego is another organizing feature of the personality in its dealings with inner environment.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我既以其惯常否认的行为类型为特征，也以其惯常接受的行为类型为特征。然而，它并非人格唯一的组织面向。它只是人格在处理物理环境时的组织面向。内我则是人格在处理内在环境时的另一个组织特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The overall needs of the personality are always taken into consideration by what I have called in the past the inner ego. Now this portion of the self is indeed self-conscious in the highest meaning of the term--aware of the subconscious portion of the personality, aware of the primary conscious framework that you call your ego, and constantly directs the overall activities. This portion is aware of the complicated workings of the nervous system and all bodily functions. It is the overseer. It knows when to allow subconscious needs and wishes their fulfillment. It knows when to put fulfillment off for a time. It is this part of the personality that is in charge of overall stability.
quotes.translation: 人格的整体需求始终被我过去所称的内我纳入考量。这个自我部分确实具有最高意义上的自我意识——它知晓人格的潜意识部分，知晓你称之为自我的主要意识框架，并持续引导整体活动。这个部分了解神经系统的复杂运作及所有身体功能。它是监督者。它知道何时允许潜意识的需求与愿望获得满足，也知道何时暂缓实现。正是人格的这个部分负责整体稳定性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner ego directs all activities which are deeply subjective. The outer ego as you know deals with the manipulation of the self in the physical environment. You must remember that the whole self is more than the sum of its parts; and also, since it is action, it is never the same. It is therefore impossible at any moment to pinpoint the personality. Therefore the whole self is not only the sum of the personality as you know it in your time, it is also the sum of what it has been and what it shall be. For as I have explained action is simultaneous, and time as you think of it is caused by your own physical perception.
quotes.translation: 内在自我主导所有深具主观性的活动。你所知的外在自我则处理自我在物质环境中的操控。你必须谨记，整体自我大于其部分之和；同时，由于它是行动，它从未相同。因此，在任何时刻都无法精准定位人格。所以整体自我不仅是你时间中所知的人格总和，也是它过去与未来所是的一切总和。正如我所解释的，行动是同时性的，而你所认为的时间是由你自身的物质感知所造成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. Your stereophonic setting can be compared to what we have termed the inner ego. Now each of these selves experience time in their own manner, and as you should see by now this only means that they build their own realities according to the nature of their own perceptions. But the nature of their own perceptions is not chaotic. The portions of the self are so constructed, so to speak, that when the stereophonic channel is turned on the selves then know their unity. Their various realities merge in the overall perceptions of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 现在。你的立体声设置可比拟我们所说的内在自我。这些自我各自以其方式体验时间，而你现在应已明白，这仅意味着它们根据自身感知的性质构建自己的实相。但它们的感知性质并非混乱的。可以说，自我的各个部分被如此构建，以至于当立体声频道开启时，这些自我便知晓它们的统一性。它们各自不同的实相在整体自我的全面感知中融合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: When the two are in balance and when there is communication between them, then the inner ego can directly communicate with the outer ego, bring to it the necessary enlightenments, and give it, that is give the outer ego the benefit of its own, the inner ego's own, condensed comprehension and direct participation in the existence of the universe as a whole.
quotes.translation: 当两者处于平衡且彼此沟通时，内在自我便能直接与外在自我交流，为其带来必要的启迪，并赋予它——即赋予外在自我——内在自我自身浓缩的理解力，以及直接参与宇宙整体存在的益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The combined molecular consciousnesses, retaining identity, form a gestalt consciousness that is the ego, the outer ego, that is in turn utilized by the consciousness of the inner ego. The inner ego being unhampered by the laws of your plane, once having entered your plane at physical birth, can therefore leave the physical body and then reconstruct it.
quotes.translation: 组合的分子意识保留其身份，形成一个完形意识，即外我，而内我的意识则利用这个外我。内我不受你们层面法则的束缚，一旦在物质出生时进入你们的层面，便能离开物质身体并重新构建它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: （Seth began discussing the inner ego along with the inner senses, so material on it is woven through the sessions. A few recent sessions dealing with the inner ego are: 94, 151, 162, 173. See Volumes 3 and 4.）
quotes.translation: （赛斯开始讨论内我以及内在感官，因此相关材料贯穿于各节中。最近几节涉及内我的内容包括：第94、151、162、173节。见第三卷和第四卷。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In the various levels of existence the inner and outer egos begin to merge. Gradually direct experience of inner reality is spoon-fed by the inner ego through the mouth of the subconscious to the outer ego. The division between the inner and outer egos is necessary for other reasons than the nature of direct experience itself. That is, the outer ego is shielded from direct experience of reality because it could not take the impact of such experience. But this is not the only reason.
quotes.translation: 在存在的各个层面上，内我与外我开始融合。逐渐地，内我通过潜意识的嘴巴，将内在实相的直接经验一勺一勺地喂给外我。内我与外我之间的划分，除了直接经验本身的性质外，还有其他原因。也就是说，外我被屏蔽于对实相的直接经验之外，因为它无法承受这种经验的冲击。但这并非唯一的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is focused inward, with as much intensity as the outer ego is focused outward. This inner ego is in many respects a composite, as indeed to a lesser degree the outer ego is a composite.
quotes.translation: 内我专注于内在，其专注强度与外我专注于外在时不相上下。这个内我在许多方面是一个复合体，事实上外我在较小程度上也是一个复合体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I call this seemingly unconscious the "inner ego," for it directs inner activities. It correlates information that is perceived not through the physical senses, but through other inner channels. It is the inner perceiver of reality that exists beyond the three-dimensional. It carries within it the memory of each of your past existences. It looks into subjective dimensions that are literally infinite, and from these subjective dimensions all objective realities flow. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 我将这个看似无意识的自我称为"内我"，因为它指挥内在活动。它整合的信息并非通过肉体感官感知，而是通过其他内在通道获取。它是存在于三维之外实相的内在感知者。它携带着你每一世存在的记忆。它审视着真正无限的主观维度，而所有客观实相皆从这些主观维度流出。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner ego however is to some degree still familiar with their activities. Solutions found by these dream personalities are automatically picked up by the inner ego, and transmitted to the various levels of the self. The dream world changes as the personality changes, so that it is always a part of the mobile personality framework.
quotes.translation: 然而内我在某种程度上仍熟悉它们的活动。这些梦境人格找到的解决方案会自动被内我拾取，并传输到自我的各个层面。梦境世界随人格变化而变化，因此它始终是流动人格框架的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When and if the dominant personality becomes aware of this situation, it automatically expands. It consciously contains experience that was previously subconscious. Now. The inner ego is quite familiar with the existence of the physically-oriented ego, but the physically-oriented ego is not usually familiar with its inner counterpart.
quotes.translation: 当主导人格意识到这一情况时，它便会自动扩展。它开始有意识地容纳先前属于潜意识层面的经验。现在，内在自我对面向物质世界的自我相当熟悉，但面向物质世界的自我通常并不熟悉其内在对应体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner ego does the actual work that brings about the events you have decided upon. In very simple terms, if you want to pick up a book, and then do so, you experience that event consciously, though you are quite unaware of all of the inner events that occurred to bring the motion about. The inner ego directs those activities.
quotes.translation: 内在自我实际执行着那些带来你已决定之事件的工作。简单来说，如果你想拿起一本书并付诸行动，你会有意识地经历这一事件，尽管你完全不了解促成这一动作的所有内在事件。内在自我指导着这些活动。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As you know therefore we have differentiated between an outer ego, who manipulates within physical reality, and an inner ego who directs the activities of the inner self. Now then, the next step should indeed be clear. In the main, the ego deals with secondary realities, and in the main, the inner ego deals with primaries.
quotes.translation: 因此，如你所知，我们区分了在物质实相中运作的外在自我，与指导内在自我活动的内在自我。那么，下一步应当十分明确。大体而言，外在自我处理次要实相，而内在自我主要处理首要实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is quite capable of dealing with both types of experience, and it is of course to this inner ego that your own suggestions will make sense, and be acted upon.
quotes.translation: 内在自我完全有能力处理这两种经验，当然，你自己的暗示会对这个内在自我产生意义，并被其付诸行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is the ego or directive consciousness behind all personified aspects of the subconscious; in dormant fashion however, and contrary to Jung's propositions, within the subconscious and in those personified aspects of it will be found remnant memory personalities of past reincarnated selves. They may be called shadows and yet they are not powerless. The inner ego, the directive organizer of the subconscious, also is the part of the self which is familiar with activities and methods of which the outer ego is ignorant. It is this organizer who directs not only the movements of the physical body from within, but directs from within those intimate survival mechanisms, without which the physical body could not exist, and upon which the existence of the outer ego is so dependent.
quotes.translation: 它是潜意识所有拟人化面向背后的自我或指导性意识；然而，以潜伏的方式，并且与荣格的命题相反，在潜意识及其拟人化面向中，会发现过去转世自我的残余记忆人格。它们可被称为阴影，却并非无力。内在自我，潜意识的指导性组织者，也是自我中熟悉外在自我所不知的活动和方法的部分。正是这个组织者不仅从内部指导肉体的运动，而且从内部指导那些亲密的生存机制，没有这些机制，肉体就无法存在，而外在自我的存在如此依赖这些机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: These dream activities have a pulsing quality that could be compared with the pulsing of heartbeat, and that are quite as vital to the human system. So much telepathic communication is received at this level that the lines of individuality are not as brilliant. Yet individuality does exist here, but it takes a strong organizing system, with amazing powers of discrimination, to handle such data; and it takes the human personality to stand firm upon its own identity while it is, on this other dreaming level, open to so many communications that are not its own. It is the ego, practically speaking, who attempts to do the distinguishing here; but the inner core of the self, the inner ego of which we have spoken, manages the basic chore. The setting up of the ego represented at once the necessity of boundaries, represented a cutting apart from, a divorcing, and a rigid limiting function. Initially this was necessary while this new sort of creature learned to maintain itself as a separate unit.
quotes.translation: 这些梦境活动具有一种脉动特质，可与心跳的脉动相比，对人类系统同样至关重要。在此层次接收如此多的心灵感应沟通，以至于个体性的线条不那么鲜明。然而个体性确实在此存在，但它需要一个强大的组织系统，具有惊人的辨别能力，来处理这样的数据；并且需要人类人格坚定地立足于自己的身份，同时在这个不同的梦境层次上，对如此多不属于自己的沟通保持开放。实际上，是自我试图在此进行区分；但我们所谈论的自我内在核心，内在自我，则处理基本的杂务。自我的建立同时代表了界限的必要性，代表了一种切割分离、一种脱离和一种严格的限制功能。最初，当这种新生物学习将自己维持为一个独立单元时，这是必要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner ego or the inner self-conscious self directs such experiences and uses the inner senses in much the same way that you use the outer senses, except that the inner ego knows all of the mechanics involved in the use of the inner senses, and you know little of the mechanics involved with the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 内在自我或内在自意识自我引导这类经验，并运用内在感官，其方式与你们运用外在感官极为相似，不同之处在于内在自我完全了解运用内在感官所涉及的所有机制，而你们对外在感官所涉及的机制却所知甚少。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You will see why this is an important point when you reread this material. You will see why, although the conscious human being may seem to be the result of this combination and recombination, he is, nevertheless, more than that result. He is a particular personality formed purposely, and not in a random fashion, the inner ego creating a replica of itself to function within a definite, peculiar set of circumstances. This is extremely important.
quotes.translation: 当你们重读这段资料时，就会明白为何这一点如此重要。你们将会理解，尽管有意识的人类看似是这种组合与再组合的结果，但人类绝不仅止于此。他是特意形成的特定人格，而非随机产生——内在自我创造自身的复制品，使其在特定而独特的环境条件下运作。这一点极为关键。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You would find it difficult to attend to or be aware of regular outer stimuli while you dealt with the ordinary function of daily life. Is it then any wonder that the outer ego leaves the inner data to the safekeeping of the inner ego? You are truly babes in the woods, having enough trouble getting along in your own universe. And do not get your feelings hurt, I am not referring to either of you in particular, as you should know by now.
quotes.translation: 当你们处理日常生活的普通功能时，要同时关注或觉察常规的外在刺激本就困难。那么，外在自我将内在数据交由内在自我保管，又有什么好惊讶的呢？你们在宇宙中就像林间迷途的婴孩，光是应付自身所处的世界就已焦头烂额。请别觉得受伤——你们现在应该明白，我并非特指你们两位。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There are shadings and variations and that is all. The inner ego is that part of the inner self which is closely allied with the outer ego, in that it is to some degree a director of function and activity. But it is not sharply focused. It looks inward. Here we run into some language difficulty.
quotes.translation: 只有层次与变化，仅此而已。内在自我是内在自体的一个部分，与外在自我紧密相连，因为它在一定程度上是功能与活动的指挥者。但它并不聚焦于外在，而是向内观照。在此我们遇到了一些语言上的困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The practical nature of his own dreams was also more apparent, for again, his dreams sent him precise visions as to where food might be located, for example, and for some centuries there were human migrations of a kind that now you see the geese make. All of those journeys followed literal paths that were given as information in the dream state. [But] more and more man began to identify himself with his exterior environment. He began to think of his inner ego almost as if it were a stranger to himself. It became his version of the soul, and there seemed to be a duality--a self who acted in the physical universe, and a separate spiritlike soul that acted in an immaterial world.
quotes.translation: 他自身梦境的实用性质也更为明显，因为他的梦再次提供了精确的异象，例如食物可能位于何处。在几个世纪里，曾有过人类迁徙，其方式正如你们现在所见的大雁迁徙。所有这些迁徙都遵循着在梦境状态中作为信息给出的实际路径。但人类越来越开始将自己与外在环境认同。他开始几乎把内在自我视为一个陌生人。它成了他心目中的灵魂版本，于是出现了一种二元性——一个在物质宇宙中行动的自己，与一个在非物质世界中行动的、类似精神的灵魂。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I suggest your break, and if this hasn't broken you up then nothing will. You are indeed as you can see broken up a million times, and put together in many various manners; and yet you retain the inner ego, and in other words your own identity. But this identity must change. This again is no contradiction. Nothing can be static, and believe it or not, nothing is.
quotes.translation: 我建议你们休息一下，如果这还没把你们拆散，那就没什么能了。你们确实如你们所见，被拆散了无数次，又以各种不同的方式重组；然而你们仍保留着内在自我，换句话说，就是你们自己的身份。但这个身份必须改变。这再次并非矛盾。没有任何事物可以是静止的，信不信由你，确实没有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: He makes a good point, saying that the ego cannot know unconscious material directly. He does not realize however, nor do your other psychologists, what I have told you often --that there is an inner ego; and it is this inner ego that organizes what Jung would call unconscious material.
quotes.translation: 他说得很有道理，指出自我无法直接知晓无意识材料。然而他并未意识到，你们的其他心理学家也不明白，我常对你们说的——存在一个内在自我；正是这个内在自我组织着荣格所谓的无意识材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner ego therefore is your counterpart. It breaks energy down into simple components, but it must still operate within the given laws of the inner universe. It therefore forms the separate molecules and atoms that will compose the individual. Its own knowledge is put into condensed form, and the molecules are therefore able to combine and recombine, according to the material properties inherent in your universe.
quotes.translation: 因此内在自我是你的对应体。它将能量分解为简单成分，但仍须在内在宇宙的既定法则中运作。它由此形成构成个体的独立分子与原子。它自身的知识被浓缩成压缩形态，分子因而能根据你们宇宙固有的物质属性进行组合与重组。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: To some extent it also acts like a director of experience and action. It is not actually composed of the past egos, but of those dominant aspects of the various personalities. The inner ego, as action, thrusts in an inward direction; that is, back toward the originating impulse. The outside ego thrusts outward. They are two faces, therefore, and form one of many spheres of action, one pulling inward and one outward.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，它也扮演着经验与行动导演的角色。它并非由过往自我组成，而是由各个性格的主导面向构成。作为行动，内在自我向内推进；即朝向原初冲动的方向。外在自我则向外推进。因此它们是两张面孔，构成众多行动球体之一，一个向内拉，一个向外推。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner ego looks inward, yet in looking inward it looks outward toward those vast portions of the self. Because there is always action within action, and because of the three dilemmas of which we have spoken earlier, the new personalities projected outward into other fields of perception, or other moment points, these other personalities in turn create new ones, and the cycle is again repeated.
quotes.translation: 内在自我向内观照，然而在向内观照时，它又向外望向自我的那些广阔部分。由于行动中始终存在行动，也由于我们先前谈到的三重困境，向外投射到其他感知领域或其它时间点的新人格，又会反过来创造新的人格，如此循环往复。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is this inner self, out of the massive knowledge and unlimited scope of its consciousness, that forms the physical world, that provides stimuli to keep the ego constantly at the job of awareness . It is the inner self, termed here the inner ego, that organizes, initiates, projects, controls the EE units of which we have been speaking lately, transforming energy into objects, into matter.
quotes.translation: 正是这个内在自我——凭借其浩瀚的知识与无垠的意识范畴——构建了物质世界，提供了持续刺激，使自我始终处于觉察状态。正是这个被称为内在自我的内在组织者，组织、启动、投射并控制着我们近来讨论的EE单位，将能量转化为物体，转化为物质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Many actual physical intervening steps are cut out. The ego becomes more similar to the inner ego than to its old self, comparatively speaking. This altered ego is aware of large portions of inner reality that were previously denied. Structurally it remains intact, and yet it has changed chemically, and electromagnetically. It is able to open up so that inner experience can be received.
quotes.translation: 许多实际物理介入步骤被省略了。相对而言，自我变得比其旧有自我更接近内在自我。这个被改变的自我能够觉察到先前被否定的内在实相的大部分。它在结构上保持完整，却在化学与电磁层面发生了改变。它得以敞开，从而能够接收内在体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The organism is the center of this happening, then, the core. The ego attempts to stand apart and observe, but in order to do so it narrows the available field of perception. Once it has formed its characteristics, it has already become too specialized to do more than observe certain limited fields of activity. It is of course itself observed by the inner ego, which has managed to maintain its position securely within subjective reality, where it has a wider though somewhat less intense viewpoint.
quotes.translation: 因此，这个发生事件的核心是生物体本身。自我试图抽身观察，但为了做到这点，它必须缩小可感知的领域。一旦形成自身特性，它已变得过于专门化，只能观察有限的活动领域。当然，它本身也被内在自我所观察——内在自我成功地将自身稳固地保持在主观实相中，在那里拥有更广阔但稍欠强烈的视角。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I do not mean that Ruburt should not read the material, but he should not read it immediately before a session. It overawes him. I do use much of his subconscious knowledge. I do draw upon the knowledge of his own inner ego. He is helping me very much as it is, but please, Ruburt, do not meddle. Tonight with your overhasty pronouncements on my part you meddled, however innocently.
quotes.translation: 我并非说鲁柏不该阅读这些资料，但他不应在课程前立即阅读。这会令他过度敬畏。我的确运用了他许多潜意识知识，也汲取了他内在自我的认知。他目前已经帮了我很多，但请鲁柏不要干预。今晚你对我那仓促的论断，无论多么无心，都构成了干预。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You shut off stimuli to concentrate on other stimuli. This is a simplified example of how in the dream state you shut out stimuli usually accepted by the ego, and become conscious of other realities that you usually ignore in the waking state. You create the dream world continuously. You are familiar with it and intimate with it, and you know it well. In this discussion there should be some remarks made concerning the existence of the inner ego, of which I believe you are not familiar.
quotes.translation: 你关闭某些刺激以专注其他刺激。这是简化的例子：在梦境状态中，你关闭了自我通常接受的刺激，转而觉察到清醒状态下常被忽略的其他实相。你持续创造着梦境世界，对它既熟悉又亲密，深知其本质。在此讨论中，应当提及内在自我的存在——我相信你们对此尚不熟悉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: No action can be considered by itself. There is no solitary action. Such a possibility is basically meaningless. Nor does a tension exist in isolation. In all of these matters there is also constant pulsations of action within the outer ego, the inner ego, and all the other aspects of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 没有任何行动可以单独看待。没有孤立的行动。这种可能性基本上毫无意义。紧张状态也不会孤立存在。在所有这些事物中，外在自我、内在自我以及整体自我的所有其他面向内部，也存在着持续不断的行动脉动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The ego, as you now know it. will not always be necessary, you see, but a type of ego is a basis for individuality and will always be necessary. An inner ego, of course, that contains various egos that have been or will be a portion of any given self--these egos and any ego organizes experience along various lines and ties experience together within meaningful pattern.
quotes.translation: 你现在所知的自我，你看，并非永远必要，但某种类型的自我是个体性的基础，将永远必要。当然，内在自我包含了曾属于或将成为任何特定自我一部分的各种自我——这些自我以及任何自我都沿着不同路线组织经验，并将经验串联成有意义的模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is then this inner identity. It is closely allied with the entity, and connects a reality that is purely psychic, the reality of the entity, with a reality that is mainly physical, the reality of the physical self.
quotes.translation: 内在自我因此就是这个内在身份。它与存有紧密相连，并将纯粹心灵的实相（存有的实相）与主要属于物质的实相（物质自我的实相）连接起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Before we close I want to mention the importance of the third inner sense with the experience of concept patterns. The third inner sense, involving what you would call perception of past, present and future, is the sense that enables the inner ego and entities to experience direct concept-patterns, and free them therefore from successive cause and effect limitations.
quotes.translation: 在我们结束之前，我想提及第三内在感官在概念模式体验中的重要性。第三内在感官涉及你们所谓的过去、现在与未来的感知，它使内在自我和存有得以直接体验概念模式，从而摆脱连续因果关系的限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Through the inner senses then, you may perceive the inner laws, and remember that the inner ego knows what it is about. The intellect of the outer ego is but a pale image of your own inner ego. We will also go into this later.
quotes.translation: 通过内在感官，你们可以感知内在法则，并记住内在自我知晓其本质。外在自我的智力不过是你们内在自我的苍白映像。这一点我们稍后也会深入探讨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The consciousness had its origin in the subconscious, from which it sprang. The consciousness was not at one time the center of the subconscious. However, the inner ego was always the center of the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 意识起源于潜意识，并从中迸发而出。意识并非始终是潜意识的中心。然而，内在自我始终是潜意识的中心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is therefore the director of afi activities, both in the waking and dream condition. It is the inner ego from whom you receive your inspiration, and it is the inner ego which gives consent to our meetings.
quotes.translation: 因此它是所有活动的指挥者，无论是在清醒状态还是梦境中。它是你从中获得灵感的内在自我，也是同意我们会面的内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner ego knows what it is about. This inner data is transmitted through the mental genetic system by way of the generalized molecular consciousness to the chromosome system, and the chromosome system then translates data into a physical code for the cells to follow. You will find this fits in with the material from our previous session.
quotes.translation: 内在自我清楚自己的意图。这些内在数据通过心灵遗传系统，经由普遍化的分子意识传递到染色体系统，然后染色体系统将数据转化为细胞遵循的物理编码。你会发现这与我们上一节课的内容相符。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The self will truly utilize the atoms and molecules; the consciousness will travel by this method. The particular physical body will then be known for what it is: a cooperative psychic gestalt, a psychio-physical structure formed together by the inner ego, utilizing atoms and molecules that are in themselves living and conscious.
quotes.translation: 自我将真正利用原子和分子；意识将通过这种方式旅行。届时特定的物质身体将被认清其本质：一个合作性的心灵完形，一个由内在自我利用本身具有生命和意识的原子与分子共同形成的心理-物理结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Such an outer ego turned inner ego, has only experienced existence then upon a particular plane. It is therefore filled with impatience as far as existence upon other planes are concerned; and therefore if it developed upon your plane initially, it will not choose to initiate anew there, but will choose other planes of activity.
quotes.translation: 这样一个由外在自我转向内在自我的自我，只曾在某一特定层面上体验过存在。因此，就其他层面的存在而言，它充满了不耐；所以，如果它最初是在你们的层面上发展出来的，它就不会选择在那里重新开始，而会选择其他活动层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It senses realities usually closed to it. It thinks, "There is more, but beyond I cannot follow." Here with this realization the inner ego may suddenly open. Intuitive springs rush to the surface, and because the outer ego has already been alerted, it is able to accept these realities while still performing its ordinary duties.
quotes.translation: 它感知到通常对它封闭的实相。它想："还有更多，但超出我所能追随的范围。"有了这种认知，内在自我可能会突然开启。直觉的泉源涌上表面，而由于外在自我已经警觉，它便能在执行日常职责的同时接纳这些实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This is not to say that the outer ego is a puppet. It is to say that the outer ego is far less conscious than the inner ego or the inner self, that its perception is less, that it is far less stable, though it makes great pretense at stability; that it springs from the inner self, and is less rather than more, aware. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 这并不是说外在自我是个傀儡。而是说，外在自我远不如内在自我或内在自体那样有意识，它的感知力较弱，远不如内在自我稳定——尽管它极力假装稳定；它源自内在自体，但意识更少而非更多。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is thinned out further by my own subconscious, because my inner and outer egos are not yet a complete unity, although I am, or my outer ego is, in direct contact with my inner ego on some occasions. Nevertheless my subconscious is not yet dispensed with but is still retained somewhat in the order of your archaic appendix.
quotes.translation: 它被我的潜意识进一步稀释，因为我的内在自我与外在自我尚未完全统一——尽管在某些情况下，我（或我的外在自我）与内在自我有直接接触。然而我的潜意识尚未被摒弃，仍像你们那古老的阑尾一样被部分保留着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner ego sees and knows itself as a part of this action or happening, and sees the entire identity existing in various dimensions simultaneously. The outer ego attempts to cut action short, and so its viewpoint is limited by its own attempt. It perceives its birth and its death, but not beyond its birth or its death.
quotes.translation: 内在自我视自身为这行动或事件的一部分，并看见整个身份同时存在于不同维度中。外在自我则试图截断行动，因此其视角受限于自身的企图。它感知到自身的诞生与死亡，却无法超越其诞生与死亡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is however a portion of you, the deeper identity who forms both the inner ego and the outer ego, who decided that you would be a physical being in this place and in this time. This is the core of your identity, the psychic seed from which you sprang, the multidimensional personality of which you are part.
quotes.translation: 然而，你有一部分——那同时塑造了内在自我与外在自我的更深层身份——决定了你将在此时此地成为物质存在。这是你身份的核心，是你从中萌发的灵性种子，是你所属的多维人格。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Without the determination of the inner ego, cohesion of identity would be impossible. The self as you know it is many things, and contains many more vestibules and rooms than you now imagine. Even the outer ego contains multitudinous chambers and interconnections of which you are unaware.
quotes.translation: 若无内在自我的决心，身份认同的凝聚便不可能。你所认知的自我包含诸多层面，其内在的厅室与通道远比你此刻想象的更为繁复。就连外在自我也蕴藏着无数你尚未觉察的密室与互联结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I told you from the beginning that the inner ego is aware of data that is received through the inner senses as well as data from the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 我从一开始便告知诸位，内在自我既觉察通过内在感官接收的信息，也感知来自外在感官的数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is the self that looks outward. It is the self that you call egotistically aware. The inner self became what I refer to as the inner ego. It looks into that inner reality, that psychic dimension of awareness from which both your own consciousness and your body consciousness emerged.
quotes.translation: 这是向外审视的自我。这是你称之为自我意识觉醒的那个自我。内在自我演变为我所说的内在自我。它向内审视那个内在实相——那个孕育出你自身意识与身体意识的心灵维度。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner ego has access, again, to a much vaster amount of knowledge. It is aware not only of its own private position, as you are of yours, but it is also familiar with the mass events of its reality. It is intimately involved in the creation of your own private experience.
quotes.translation: 内在自我同样能获取更庞大的知识库。它不仅知晓自身的私人处境（如同你了解自己的处境），也熟悉其所属实相中的群体事件。它深度参与着你个人经验的创造过程。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Let us consider the following. The individual within your system--and this is quite simplified--an individual finds himself with a choice of three actions. He chooses one of these and experiences it within the physical field. The other two actions are experienced however, but not within the physical system. The results of the other two actions are perceived by the inner ego.
quotes.translation: 让我们思考以下情况：你们系统中的个体——此处已大幅简化——当面临三种行动选择时，他会择一在物质领域体验。另外两种行动虽未被物质系统接纳，却仍被内在自我所感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The "outer ego" and the inner ego operate together, the one to enable you to manipulate in the world that you know, the other to bring you those delicate inner perceptions without which physical existence could not be maintained.
quotes.translation: "外在自我"与内在自我协同运作：前者使你得以在已知世界中运作，后者则为你带来那些精微的内在感知——若无这些感知，物质存在将无法维系。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner ego is then the "I" of the astral body.
quotes.translation: 内我因此是星光体的“我”。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json
